nodes.context: Camorra clan operating in Afragola, Casoria, Arzano, Caivano and Lazio region; involved in drug trafficking, money laundering, political corruption.
Camorra alliance opposing the Nuova Camorra Organizzata.
Camorra organization led by Raffaele Cutolo.
Rival Camorra clan that killed Vincenzo Moccia; later defeated by Moccia clan.
Camorra clan; Moccia clan shot down one of its pillars.

edges.evidence_quote: The Moccia clan was always a loyal member of the Nuova Famiglia in the war against the Nuova Camorra Organizzata led by Raffaele Cutolo.
edges.context: Moccia clan was a loyal member of the Nuova Famiglia alliance.

edges.evidence_quote: The Moccia clan was always a loyal member of the Nuova Famiglia in the war against the Nuova Camorra Organizzata led by Raffaele Cutolo.
edges.context: Nuova Famiglia was at war with Nuova Camorra Organizzata.

edges.evidence_quote: In 1987, Mazza's favorite son Vincenzo Moccia, called Angioletto , was killed by the rival Magliulo clan, that led to another bloody war between the clans, the Moccias came out victorious.
edges.context: Magliulo clan killed Vincenzo Moccia, leading to a war that Moccia clan won.

edges.evidence_quote: With the downfall of the Magliulo clan, the Moccia clan shot down one of the pillars of the Alfieri clan in the northeast area of Naples.
edges.context: Moccia clan weakened the Alfieri clan by destroying one of its pillars.
